org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport

类 ServerDelegate

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.ServerDelegate
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Resetable, Endpoint, IdleSensible, RemotingServer
    直接已知子类:
    ServerPeer

    public class ServerDelegate
extends Object
implements RemotingServer
